site.title: Albert Lecomte — UI Designer
site.description: UI Designer based in Mulhouse, France. I create modern, accessible and high-performance websites for craftsmen, retailers and businesses in the region.
hero.name: Albert Lecomte
hero.title: UI Designer & Web Developer
hero.subtitle: Looking for a role in a WordPress and/or SEO agency.
about.title: About
about.subtitle: Passionate about design and the web
about.p1: WordPress Architect and UI/UX Designer based in Mulhouse, I am currently actively searching for a position within an agency specialized in WordPress or SEO.
about.p2: My approach? Combining modern and professional design with high-performance, accessible websites that are perfectly optimized for search engines.
about.p3: From Figma prototyping to complete WordPress integration, I master the entire web production chain.
